prs.title: Adding hover effect on get involved button
prs.body: --- name: Pull Request about: Submit changes to the Sugar Labs website for review --- ## 📝 Description This PR fixes the Hovering effect on the "Get Involved" button in the Volunteer Development page . This would make it consistent with other buttons on the website. ## 🔗 Related Issue Fixes: #556 ## 🔄 Type of Change - [ ] 📱 New Feature (new page, component, or functionality) - [x] 🎨 UI/UX Update (visual changes, styling improvements) - [ ] 📖 Content Update (text changes, documentation) - [x] 🐛 Bug Fix - [ ] ⚡ Performance Improvement - [ ] ♿ Accessibility Enhancement - [ ] 🔒 Security Update - [ ] 📦 Dependency Update - [ ] 🧹 Code Refactoring - [ ] 🧪 Test Updates ## 📷 Visual Changes Before: After: ### 🖥️ Responsive Design - [x] Desktop (1200px+) - [x] Tablet (768px - 1199px) - [x] Mobile (320px - 767px) ## ♿ Accessibility - [x] Proper heading hierarchy maintained - [x] ARIA labels added where needed - [x] Color contrast requirements met - [x] Keyboard navigation works correctly - [x] Screen reader testing performed ## 📋 PR Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's coding style guidelines - [x] I have tested these changes locally - [x] I have updated the documentation accordingly - [x] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors - [x] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works - [x] All existing tests pass successfully - [x] I have checked for and resolved any merge conflicts - [x] I have optimized images/assets (if applicable) - [x] I have validated all links are working correctly --- ### 📚 Reviewer Resources - [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/sugarlabs/www-v2/blob/main/docs/CONTRIBUTING.md) - [Style Guide](https://github.com/sugarlabs/www-v2/blob/main/docs/dev_guide.md) - [Community Chat](https://matrix.to/#/#sugarlabs-web:matrix.org) Thank you for contributing to the Sugar Labs website! 🎉

prs.title: Add hovering effect on navbar links
prs.body:
# 🛠️ Pull Request Template

## 📌 Related Issue
Fixes #44 

## ✨ Description
Added a glowing effect to the Navbar links.

## 🧪 Type of Change
Select all that apply:
- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix  
- [ ] ✨ New feature  
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor  
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update  
- [x] 💄 UI/UX improvement  
- [ ] 🔧 Chore or maintenance  

## 🧩 How Has This Been Tested?
Open the website locally and check the glowing effect on the navbar links when you hover over them.

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)


https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2d3bf86a-c098-4c64-af02-b8cbbd3afd75



## ✅ Checklist
- [x] My code follows the project’s style guidelines  
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my code  
- [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [x] My changes generate no new warnings or errors    
- [x] Linked the related issue number properly  

---

💚 Thank you for contributing to **CareEase**!

issues.title: [BUG]:  "Get Involved" button on Volunteer page lacks hover effect
issues.body: ## Description The main "Get Involved" button on the Volunteer Development page does not have a hover effect. ## How To Reproduce ## Expected behavior On hovering the mouse over the "Get Involved" button, the background color will change to a slightly darker color. This would make it consistent with other buttons on the website. ## Screenshots ## Checklist - [x] I have read and followed the project's Code of Conduct. - [x] I have searched for similar issues before creating this one. - [x] I have provided sufficient details to understand and reproduce the issue. I have provided all the necessary information to understand and reproduce the issue. - [x] I am willing to help resolve this issue. --- Thank you for reporting this issue! Your contributions help us improve the project. 📚 **See:** [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/sugarlabs/www-v2/blob/main/docs/CONTRIBUTING.md). 🙋🏾🙋🏼 Need help? Join our [Community Matrix Server](https://matrix.to/#/#sugarlabs-web:matrix.org).

issues.title: [feedback]: Padding in navbar is very low
issues.body:
Problem:
Currently, the navbar looks a little odd because it has very low padding, and the navbar links are also very small in size. Additionally, the location of the search bar is not very visually appealing.

My suggestions:
I want to add some padding in the navbar and increase the size of navbar links, i will keep it medium not soo small not so big. If You want i can also applying a more appealing font and  i can change the location of the search bar and place it in the navbar but to the opposite side of navbar buttons or i can explore other location whichever suits it better.

issues.title: [UI/UX]: improving the UI of Home page
issues.body:
Currently, the font style, background color, and the effect on buttons are not so good.
I can improve the font style, background color, and add a footer section, and also add some links on navbar section like Home, About us, Contact, Service and etc. This will improve the UI of the Home page

issues.title: [feat]: Adding a login/signup page.
issues.body:
Currently, there is no login signup page. 
I can add a new login/signup page.

issues.title: [UI/UX] Adding glowing effect on Navbar links.
issues.body: ## 🖌️ Description I want to add a glowing effect to the navbar links, which glows when hovered over. --- ## 💡 Current Design / Behavior Currently, there is no effect on navbar links, which makes the navbar look odd. --- ## 🚀 Proposed Enhancement Explain your proposed visual or interaction changes. Include details such as: - applying a glowing effect on navbar links, which glows when hovered over them. - Improved layout - It will improve the UI of the Home page (like it looks modern) - User flow --- ## 🧠 Expected Outcome When the user moves the cursor to the navbar buttons, they see a glowing effect on them. --- ## 📸 Screenshots or Mockups If available, include screenshots, Figma frames, or before/after images for clarity. *(Drag and drop images below)* --- Before: After: --- ### ✅ Checklist - [x] I’ve checked that this enhancement doesn’t duplicate an existing issue - [x] The proposal aligns with CareEase’s overall theme and color palette - [x] I’ve provided mockups or visuals where relevant - [x] I’ve considered responsiveness and accessibility in my suggestion

issues.title: [BUG]: the heading "Climate change facts" makes the front page congested
issues.body: There is no space between the heading "Climate change facts" and the header paragraph, which makes the front page a little congested.

issues.title: feedback:  Add a button "Contributors" in navbar section which link with "contributors section".
issues.body: Adding a button in the Navbar section that scrolls you down to the contributors section.
